# memory_internalize_dual_audience

Memory systems must serve both AI and humans from a single source of truth with dual renderings: dense, structured formats for machine precision and narrative formats for human understanding and decision-making. The convergence condition is not a compromise but complementary layers—AI digest informs next-cycle decisions while human digest guides immediate judgment. Dogfooding reveals that structural awareness (skipping schema fields, distinguishing execution items) is essential to keep extracted entities honest.
